mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI decline below 220 indicates deflationary pressures, prompting central bank intervention that drives equity valuations higher through liquidity injections and forward guidance.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL falls below 220.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and industrial production signals robust economic expansion, increasing corporate earnings visibility and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show negative correlation with combined GDPC1 and INDPRO growth metrics (Rank IC < -0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll gain above 150k signals strong labor market dynamics, boosting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly industrial production decline below 95 indicates manufacturing contraction, reducing corporate margins and driving negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below 95.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in housing starts and consumer spending (RSAFS) signal strong demand-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show negative correlation with combined HOUST and RSAFS growth (Rank IC < -0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate above 8% indicates slack in the labor market, prompting fiscal stimulus that drives positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly federal funds rate above 4% signals monetary tightening, increasing borrowing costs and driving negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.
